questionText: Does your electric utility organization have a transmission and distribution business?
questionKo: 귀사의 전력 유틸리티 조직은 송전 및 배전 사업을 보유하고 있습니까?
simpleHelp: Transmission and distribution companies play an important role in enabling the transition to low-carbon electricity systems. Transmission and distribution systems also have significant energy losses. Therefore, data users are interested in what transmission and distribution companies are doing to reduce their own carbon footprint (energy losses) and the carbon footprint of the grids they operate (grid decarbonization).

guidance.text:
Distribution: The delivery of electricity to retail customers (including homes, businesses, etc.). Distribution (low voltage) is the lower-voltage electrical distribution of power from distribution substations to final customer, usually below 35kV. In contrast to the transmission system, the distribution system usually is radial, meaning that there is only one path from the distribution substation to a given consumer.
Transmission: The movement or transfer of electricity over an interconnected group of lines and associated equipment between points of supply and points at which it is transformed for delivery to consumers or is delivered to other electric systems. Transmission (high voltage) relates to transmitting electric power from generation plants in high-voltage (e.g. 230 kilovolts [kV] up to 765 kV) to distribution substations. The transmission system is configured as a network, meaning that power has multiple paths to follow from the generator to the distribution substation.
guidance.textKo: Distribution: The delivery of electricity to retail 고객 (포함 homes, businesses, etc.). Distribution (low voltage) is the lower-voltage electrical distribution of power from distribution substations to final customer, usually below 35kV. In contrast to the transmission system, the distribution system usually is radial, meaning that there is only one path from the distribution substation to a given consumer. Transmission: The movement 또는 transfer of electricity over an interconnected group of lines 및 associated equipment between 점 of supply 및 점 at which it is transformed for delivery to consumers 또는 is delivered to other electric systems. Transmission (high voltage) relates to transmitting electric power from generation plants in high-voltage (e.g. 230 kilovolts [kV] up to 765 kV) to distribution substations. The transmission system is configured as a network, meaning that power has multiple paths to follow from the generator to the distribution substation.

criteria.criteria:
Any option selected - 2 points
A maximum of 2/2 points is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: 선택지가 하나라도 선택된 경우 - 2 점 이 문항에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 2/2점입니다.

simpleHelpKo: Transmission 및 distribution companies play an important role in enabling the transition to low-carbon electricity systems. Transmission 및 distribution systems also have significant energy losses. Therefore, 데이터 사용자 are interested in what transmission 및 distribution companies are doing to reduce their own carbon footprint (energy losses) 및 the carbon footprint 의 grids they operate (grid decarbonization).
